top_pattern.name: Logos as Constitutional Architecture
top_pattern.tech_mapping: Schema-first design — define the logical structure before writing any code. The Word (Logos) preceded creation. Applied: business description in plain English generates complete technical architecture.
top_pattern.build_spec: LogosSchema — Next.js app, Claude API for NLP-to-schema, Mermaid diagram output, Vercel deploy

build_ready.name: Logical Before Physical
build_ready.tech_mapping: Evaluate AI outputs against logical criteria before deploying to production. Light before matter = validation before execution.
build_ready.build_spec: EvalGate — Python middleware, PyPI package, hosted API

to_buildworld.original_insight: Hebrew 'bara' (create from nothing) vs 'asah' (make from existing) — AI only does asah. True bara requires consciousness. This distinction defines the ceiling of every AI product we build.

to_ghanaworld.pattern_applicable: PAT-004 (Jubilee Economics) maps to cooperative business models in shea and cassava sectors. Debt forgiveness cycles mirror Ghana's IMF program cycling.
to_ghanaworld.investigation_request: Is there a Ghanaian business model that uses cyclical debt restructuring as a feature, not a bug? Jubilee pattern suggests this could be designed intentionally.
